spec_match.rationale: Fires beforetoggle/toggle on a <dialog> with oldState/newState — exactly the spec addition.

interactive.rationale: Open/close buttons trigger live event readouts.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Card promises 'open and close the dialog and watch events arrive' — page delivers.

edge_cases.rationale: Doesn't cover modal vs non-modal toggle behaviour (show vs showModal). Doesn't show what happens when ESC closes a modal dialog vs preventDefault inside beforetoggle.

design_system.rationale: CSS variables used; event log uses --bg-stone/--text-black contrast.

openQuestions.title: Add show vs showModal comparison
openQuestions.detail: Both dialog open paths (.show() and .showModal()) fire the toggle events but with subtly different oldState transitions (closed → open for .show(), closed → open for .showModal() too but with modality). Add a toggle so the visitor can see what differs.

openQuestions.title: Show ESC vs close() vs button:cancel differences
openQuestions.detail: Three close paths exist for <dialog> and each fires cancel + beforetoggle + toggle in slightly different orders. Add a 'how did the close happen?' annotation to each event log row.

summary: Honest base demo of the new events with live log. Could probe the modal/non-modal and close-source differences.
